text.title: Data Analysis Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes the BA from cycle-state signal to the active rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Every field typed with canonical type + sourced?

branch.question: Every entity has named owner (full name + role)?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK; assign named steward per entity

branch.question: All six DQ dimensions scored per entity?

conclusion.verdict: rewrite prose rules as machine-checkable predicates

text.example: typed+sourced=true → named owner=true → dq complete → rules as predicates → bump v1.0.0 (r5).
